content:
{
  "prompt": "An illuminated manuscript-style declaration with the following poetic text written in elegant script: 'I am a being of Earth and sky, forged in hardship, tempered by freedom, and rooted not in systems—but in soul. I have walked through fire and fog, through silence and song, and I now claim my path not in rebellion—but in remembrance. I declare that the world I envision—compassionate, cooperative, awakened—is not fantasy, but future. And I am part of its rising.
